---
title: "kalshi_request"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `kalshi_request()`

Build a Kalshi API Request

## Usage

```r
kalshi_request(
  path,
  method = "GET",
  query = NULL,
  body = NULL,
  kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API",
  demo = FALSE
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `path` | Character. The API endpoint path (e.g., "/trade-api/v2/markets"). |
| `method` | Character. HTTP method. Defaults to "GET". |
| `query` | Named list. Query parameters to append. |
| `body` | List. Request body for POST/PUT requests. |
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. Environment variable name for API key. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

An httr2 request object ready to perform.

## Description

Internal helper to construct an authenticated httr2 request.
